title: An Act to Direct the Department of Agriculture, Conservation and Forestry, Bureau of Parks and Lands to Prevent the Use of the Term "State Park" by Nonstate Parks
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Jan 20, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 1/20/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on March 14, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-350) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports READ On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland Tabled until Later in Today's Session, pending ACCEPTANCE of the Ought to Pass As Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-350) Report in concurrence. Unfinished Business

Taken from the table by the President On motion by Senator TALBOT ROSS of Cumberland Bill and accompanying papers COMMITTED to the Committee on Agriculture, Conservation and Forestry in NON-CONCURRENCE. Sent down for concurrence
The House RECEDED and CONCURRED to COMMITTING the Bill and accompanying papers to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY . ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

amendments.label: C "A" (H-350 )
amendments.new_title: An Act Regarding Day Use Passes That May Be Used at Any State Park or Historic Site
